channel.title: Apress on Azure Readiness starts here...
channel.description: Recent content in Apress on Azure Readiness starts here...

item.title: The Art of Realizing SRE on Azure - Book Review
item.description: As most of you know already, I enjoy writing technical (Azure related) books. So if you are wondering why it’s been quiet lately, there is a good reason for it. Actually, I was writing on my 9th book, making it 9 books in 9 years straight, but something got in-between the writing process and publishing. It’s called US Visa regulations :). Beginning this year, January 5th actually, I relocated from Belgium to Redmond, WA for Microsoft Corp.
